text:
HAIL STATE STUNNER 🔥 Mississippi State comes back to upset Oklahoma in Game 1| ESPN College Softball
See highlights as the Mississippi State Bulldogs stormed back from a 4-run deficit to upset the No. 3 Oklahoma Sooners in Game 1 of the Norman Super Regional. After Oklahoma regained the lead, Mississippi State rallied late to hand Oklahoma a stunning postseason loss and move one win away from the Women’s College World Series.
